raw_title: Price predictions 4/17: BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, BCH, LINK
raw_summary: Bitcoin pole vaulted to $78,000 and altcoins soared after Iran said that the Strait of Hormuz was fully open. Will bulls be able to sustain the upward momentum?
headline: Bitcoin Rallies to $78K; Analysts Eye Sustainability After Hormuz News
content: Bitcoin has reportedly rallied to $78,000, with altcoins also experiencing significant gains, following Iran's announcement that the Strait of Hormuz is fully open. Market analysts are now assessing whether this upward momentum can be sustained.

raw_title: Crypto market liquidations hit $820M as Bitcoin price taps $78K
raw_summary: Nearly a billion dollars in leveraged crypto positions were liquidated in the past 24 hours as the Bitcoin price rallied above $78,000.
headline: Bitcoin Rally Triggers $820M Crypto Liquidations
content: The cryptocurrency market has seen significant activity in the past 24 hours, with approximately $820 million in leveraged crypto positions liquidated. This major event was triggered by Bitcoin's price rallying sharply to tap the $78,000 level.

raw_title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs attract nearly $1B in weekly inflows as risk sentiment improves
raw_summary: Spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded nearly $1 billion in weekly inflows, their strongest performance in over three months amid improving risk sentiment.
headline: Spot Bitcoin ETFs Net Nearly $1B in Weekly Inflows, Strongest in Months
content: Spot Bitcoin Exchange Traded Funds (ETFs) have attracted nearly $1 billion in weekly inflows, marking their strongest performance in over three months. This significant capital influx suggests an improving risk sentiment among investors towards the cryptocurrency market.

headline: StreetInsider Article Promotes APEMARS as Top Crypto Pick
content: StreetInsider has published an article highlighting APEMARS as a leading cryptocurrency to buy in April, targeting investors who may have missed previous gains in Bitcoin and TRON. The piece is notably promotional, featuring a 'MARS150 Bonus Code' for potential buyers.

raw_title: Why BitMine’s Tom Lee Sees Ethereum at $62,500 in 2030 - and What the Numbers Actually Show - 24/7 Wall St.
raw_summary: Why BitMine’s Tom Lee Sees Ethereum at $62,500 in 2030 - and What the Numbers Actually Show  24/7 Wall St.
headline: Analyst Tom Lee Predicts $62,500 Ethereum by 2030, Analysis Follows
content: Noted financial analyst Tom Lee has issued a bold prediction, forecasting Ethereum could hit $62,500 by 2030. An accompanying analysis from 24/7 Wall St. delves into the numbers supporting (or challenging) this long-term cryptocurrency price target. The report provides a deep dive into the methodology and potential factors influencing such a valuation.

raw_title: Bitcoin’s Fragile Recovery Sets Up a Big Short-Squeeze Risk - Advisor Perspectives
raw_summary: Bitcoin’s Fragile Recovery Sets Up a Big Short-Squeeze Risk  Advisor Perspectives
headline: Bitcoin's Fragile Recovery Prompts Short Squeeze Warning
content: Advisor Perspectives suggests that Bitcoin's recent price recovery is fragile and potentially unsustainable. The analysis highlights a significant risk of a short-squeeze event, which could pressure those betting against the cryptocurrency.
